title: WIP - Handle FROM AS directive in Dockerfile
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Handle the Dockerfile command like:

FROM centos AS base

This is a WIP at the moment as imagebuilder will need to be vendored once: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/95 is merged.  Before that PR is vendored, these changes will break the builds.  Once the vendoring is added, I will also add tests to this PR.
